title: Election system entrusted to LMT, Tet and Latvian State Forests
summary_full: The development of the election system will be entrusted to the companies "Latvijas mobilais telefons" (LMT), "Tet," and "Latvijas valsts meži" (LVM), Prime Minister Evika Siliņa ("New Unity") announced following Tuesday’s meeting of the Crisis Management Council.
